programme.title: Fast Vengeance
programme.desc: "Upon hearing of his brother's death, a man named Shen returns to his old stomping grounds to find the men responsible and take justice into his own hands. He learns that a biker named Cobra and his ferocious gang, The Midnight Squad, were the ones responsible ... but to get anywhere close to them, he must enter the dark, turbulent realm of underground motorcycle racing. Enlisting the aid of a drag racing champion-turned-mechanic, Shen must compete in the high-stakes races where he will have one chance to confront Cobra. But when Shen's plan is revealed, he must battle both on the streets and in the ring to obtain his final revenge. Featuring hip-hop legend DMX (Belly, Romeo Must Die), Fast Vengeance is a high-octane action thriller with style — and rubber — to burn."

Oscar®-winner* Philip Seymour Hoffman (Capote) is Andy, an overextended payroll executive who lures his younger brother, Hank (Ethan Hawke, Training Day), into a larcenous scheme: the pair will rob a suburban mom-and-pop jewelry store that appears to be the quintessential easy target. The problem is, the store owners are Andy and Hank's real mom and pop, and when the seemingly perfect crime goes awry, the damage sends them hurtling toward a shattering clash that may obliterate their already precarious lives.

programme.desc: Paul and Perry kick off an adventurous journey down the Ivanhoe River, heading toward a lake that’s known to deliver steady walleye action. But this time, the fish had other plans. With walleye proving tough to track down, the duo turns to the river’s reliable residents—Northern Pike—to keep the rods bending and the spirits high. Surrounded by stunning scenery, flowing rapids, and beautiful waterfalls, this river run becomes more than just a fishing trip—it’s a reminder that the North’s wild beauty always makes the day worthwhile, no matter what’s biting.

programme.desc: An international scientific team travels to the Chagos Archipelago, a tropical paradise in the Indian Ocean, to study one of the planet’s healthiest coral reefs. Initially, they’re thrilled with the reef’s beauty and abundance. But in the space of just a few weeks they witness a serious case of bleaching…evidence that even the earth’s most isolated places aren’t safe from the ravages of climate change

Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. How do we fix what’s broken and return to farming with Mother Nature and not against it? Wayne Swanson in Chattanooga Tennessee has some answers. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.
